title: Resolved Workdir Decisions And Version-Affecting Changes

blocks.text: The following RIID-4573 decisions are absorbed into this C6 SSOT and must not be reintroduced as roadmap open questions.

rows: Local daemon archive backend default is same-host run root `keep-in-place`; S3/compressed/external storage requires an explicit archive adapter and config.
Default workdir retention is disabled; `RIIDO_WORKDIR_RETENTION_SECONDS` enables archived-run TTL cleanup and no size/task-count cleanup exists by default.
Shared repo cache prune has no automatic schedule and must be operator-triggered maintenance with a short `repo_cache_update.lock`.
Native config overlay is per-task materialization by default; user-global config overlay/copy is forbidden unless C7 and C6 explicitly add it.
Container/VM workdir delivery is owned by C4 runtime launcher / platform adapter; C6 provides host-side run root, files, and manifest.
Automatic in-place `ReinjectNativeConfig` threshold for dirty workdirs is zero; policy/config changes route through runtime upgrade flow.

items: New operation: `change:additive` with C2 Cat E event update.
Directory layout change: `change:breaking-policy` plus migration tool.
`NativeConfigVersion` algorithm change: `change:breaking-ir` while preserving old schema outputs forever.
Lock policy change: `change:breaking-policy` because distributed safety can change.
Protected path implementation change: `change:behavioral`; C7 owns policy decision while C6 owns implementation.
